_doc: INERT STUB pending voice-spec acceptance. The sprite has been on the street since the 2026-05-18 Pixellab street-pack sprints, but Design's halt condition (.antigravity/skills/design.md §Halt conditions) forbids authoring lines for an NPC whose voice is not established. This file exists only to silence the dialogue_runner missing-file warning that has been firing on interaction since 2026-05-18. The single state is voice-neutral by construction — a stage-direction-style observation with no spoken line — so it does not lock the register before Piotr accepts the voice spec. Once accepted, this stub is replaced by authored content per the spec's §Recommended scope for v1 lines.

states._comment: Voice-neutral stub. No spoken line; a stage-direction observation only. The character looks up, registers a colleague, returns to his cigarette. Replace with authored content once the voice spec is accepted.
states.speaker: stage_direction
lines: (He glances up, registers a colleague, looks back at his cigarette.)
